channel.title: learning on Senik
channel.description: Recent content in learning on Senik

item.title: thoughts on reading | reading list 2020
item.description: Side note: this blog post is longer than I expected, so if you are just here for some book recommendations, scroll to the bottom of page I’m an avid reader, I read a lot. When I was younger, I could spent dozens of hours in library, checking out all sort of genres. As it is, the times have changed, and maybe just like you, I’m slowly losing interest in books too.

item.title: stop creating, start breaking
item.description: Naturally, we are all lifelong learners. It doesn’t matter whether you are learning a language, a skill or you just enjoy the process of learning, whatever is the case I have a tip for you. Well, before I go into it, let’s start with a motto that is very popular within the community of makers, doers, or all those so-called problem solvers. Don’t get me wrong on this, but nowadays I feel like people are either CEOs or fall into one of those categories.
